About Us

About Tianyu Electric

Fuzhou Tianyu Electric Co., Ltd. is a professional manufacturer of power primary equipment.

Get a Quote

Company Profile

Fuzhou Tianyu Electric Co., Ltd. was established in 1996 by the former Fuzhou No.1 Switch Factory, Fuzhou No.2 Switch Factory and Fuzhou Electronic Transformer Factory, with registered capital of RMB 327,907,200.

Wholly-owned subsidiary of XJ Group Corporation under China Electrical Equipment Group Co., Ltd. One of the southern manufacturing bases for primary electrical equipment of China Electrical Equipment Group Co., Ltd.

High and low voltage switchgear and components, prefabricated substations, power transformers and distribution transformers, totaling more than 30 product series.

Historical Evolution

1958Fuzhou No.1 and No.2 Switch Factory and Fuzhou Electronic Transformer Factory were established.
1996Tianyu Electric was established through reorganization.
1997Tianyu Electric was listed on Shenzhen Stock Exchange.
2001Tianyu Electric joined XJ Group Corporation.
2016New factory was completed and put into operation.
2021XJ Group Corporation merged into China Electrical Equipment Group Co., Ltd.

Tianyu Electric

Professional power primary equipment manufacturer. Transformer-focused B2B website first version.

Products
